step_by_step_thinking: \boxed{A} Increases in cigarette taxes are explicitly mentioned in the context of public health policy as a method to reduce tobacco consumption. Specifically, Article-[nurse-article-29163_23] notes that "raising prices of tobacco products through taxation thus creating difficulty for adolescents to acquire tobacco." Taxation directly impacts retail pricing, so higher taxes generally translate into higher retail prices. Therefore, increases in cigarette tax rates are causally linked to increases in cigarette retail prices.
raw_response:
\boxed{A} Increases in cigarette taxes are explicitly mentioned in the context of public health policy as a method to reduce tobacco consumption. Specifically, Article-[nurse-article-29163_23] notes that "raising prices of tobacco products through taxation thus creating difficulty for adolescents to acquire tobacco." Taxation directly impacts retail pricing, so higher taxes generally translate into higher retail prices. Therefore, increases in cigarette tax rates are causally linked to increases in cigarette retail prices.
\boxed{A}
